hero.subtitle: Tchalanet helps operators manage tickets, draws, points of sale, and public verification with clearer follow-up.
hero.title: Verify tickets and check the latest draws.

footer.description: Digital infrastructure for professional management of tickets, draws, and lottery operations.

help.payment_answer: Tchalanet lets users consult ticket status. Payment, when applicable, follows the instructions from the participating point of sale.
help.subtitle: Answers about ticket verification, results, payments, and common issues.
help.title: Help

how.description: A simple path to consult ticket status and follow available results.

step1.text: Receive a ticket with QR or public code issued by a participating point of sale.
step1.title: Verifiable ticket

step2.text: Enter the public code or scan the QR to consult ticket status.
step2.title: Online verification

step3.text: Consult ticket status and confirmed results according to supported sources.
step3.title: Status and results

step4.text: If the ticket is payable, follow the displayed instructions to contact the point of sale.
step4.title: Payment instructions

how.title: How do I verify a ticket?
